ns0:entry.ns0:title: BookStackApp/BookStack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BookStackApp/BookStack
Language: php
A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
Language: php
🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreshRSS/FreshRSS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS
Language: php
A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrivateBin/PrivateBin
Language: php
A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RSS-Bridge/rss-bridge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RSS-Bridge/rss-bridge
Language: php
The RSS feed for websites missing it

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SuiteCRM/SuiteCRM
Language: php
SuiteCRM - Open source CRM for the world

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/WordPress
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/WordPress
Language: php
WordPress, Git-ified. This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please do not send pull requests. Submit pull requests to https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop and patches to https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ instead.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/invoiceninja/invoiceninja
Language: php
A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: magento/magento2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/magento/magento2
Language: php
Prior to making any Submission(s), you must sign an Adobe Contributor License Agreement, available here at: https://opensource.adobe.com/cla.html. All Submissions you make to Adobe Inc. and its affiliates, assigns and subsidiaries (collectively “Adobe”) are subject to the terms of the Adobe Contributor License Agreement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mautic/mautic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mautic/mautic
Language: php
Mautic: Open Source Marketing Automation Software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server
Language: php
☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roundcube/roundcubemail
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roundcube/roundcubemail
Language: php
The Roundcube Webmail suite
